props.name: logo
props.description: Displays the logo of the NavigationHeader.ReactNode

props.name: mobileMenuIcon
props.description: Icon displayed on the left of the NavigationHeader when viewport is less than md.ReactNode

props.name: mobileMenuFitContent
props.description: Set mobile menu to fit content instead of full screen.boolean

props.name: sticky
props.description: Sets the Root to top sticky.boolean

props.name: onSkipToMainAction
props.description: Callback to manage focus when skipping to main content (only available when navigating with keyboard).(() => void)

props.name: contained
props.description: Add a max-width to the Root container.boolean

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Make the Root container full width. Takes precedence over contained propboolean

props.name: megaMenuTriggerMode
props.description: Mega menu trigger behavior (click or hover)."click""hover"

props.name: subHeader
props.description: Secondary header content below main navigation.ReactNode

props.name: burgerMd
props.description: Shows burger menu on tablet breakpoint (md: 768-1279px).boolean

notes: Accessibility terms are present in the docs. Validate exact behavior before production use.
